items.title: New low knocks ASUS’ Azoth 75% wireless keyboards with hot-swap keys, OLED display down to $146
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops ASUS’ ROG Azoth 75% mechanical gaming keyboard down to $146.36 shipped. Don’t forget clip the on-page coupon to see the discounted price during checkout. This is originally a $250 gaming keyboard that has more recently been going for $200. The white version with Storm Clicky switches has never dipped below $155 before, so today’s offer marks a new all-time low, beating the previous best price by $9. You can, in fact, get this in black as well with linear switches, but none of them dropped below the $150 mark. This unit comes with a hot-swappable PCB, so you can always remove the clicky switches and throw in some linear or tactile switches if you prefer a different typing feel. Head below for more details.

more…

items.summary:
Aventon has expanded its Spring Sale e-bike deal lineup, and one notable new inclusion is the brand’s newer Aventure M Mid-Drive All-Terrain Smart e-bike down at $2,699 shipped. Normally going for $2,899 since releasing in 2025, this smarter commuting solution has only seen a handful of discounts to $2,799 up until today, which we last saw during its New Year Sale. Now, for the first time, you can score it with a larger-than-ever $200 markdown that lands things at a new all-time low price. Of course, if you want to save more while still getting one of the newest Aventure series e-bikes, you can find the Aventure 3 Step-Over smart e-bike down at $1,799 shipped, from $1,999, as well as its Aventure 3 Step-Through variant that is also down at $1,799 shipped. Head below to learn more about Aventon’s most premium all-terrain model and browse the expanded sale lineup.

items.title: All Babbel language courses are available for life during this exclusive offer
items.summary:
Many language-learning apps rely almost entirely on rote memorization, but that’s not necessarily a natural way to learn a language. Parents usually don’t teach their children to talk by giving them a vocab list to memorize. If you want a more practical way to learn up to 14 different languages, try Babbel. Right now, you can even get a lifetime subscription for only $159 (reg. $646.20), but that ends soon.

items.title: Score Anker’s eufyCam S3 Pro solar security camera multi-packs with 30% exclusive savings starting from $385, more
items.summary:
Anker is currently having a eufy Earth Day Sale with up to $1,000 initial savings on its wide array of security devices and robot cleaners – plus, we’ve secured an exclusive bonus sitewide savings code 9T52604 for our readers that gives you even better deals, though new releases and some select units are excluded. One notable security option to consider for your home is Anker’s eufyCam S3 Pro 2-Cam Solar Security Camera Kit with a 16GB storage hub at $385 shipped, after using the code 9T52604 at checkout, beating out the original sale pricing and its Amazon pricing by $15. Down from its $550 full price, over the last year we’ve mostly seen discounts drop the cost between $440 and $400, while there was a single fall to the $380 low back during July’s Prime Day event. You’re looking at the next-best price aside from that low from nearly nine months ago, with our exclusive code giving you a combined 30% markdown for $165 savings, while giving you an advanced solar-powered security solution. You can also find larger multi-cam kits on the same landing page, or check out the full Earth Day Sale lineup here – but don’t forget to use our exclusive code!
